title: Prepare tissue or cell cultures
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Prepare tissue or cell cultures demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria.

elements.title: Work safely according to the legal and regulatory framework

pcs.text: Identify hazards and workplace controls associated with the sample, preparation methods, reagents and equipment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify hazards and workplace controls associated with the sample, preparation methods, reagents and equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify hazards and workplace controls associated with the sample, preparation methods, reagents and equipment.

pcs.text: Select, fit and use personal protective equipment (PPE)
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, fit and use personal protective equipment (PPE)?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, fit and use personal protective equipment (PPE).

pcs.text: Address hazards and incidents as they arise in accordance with workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Address hazards and incidents as they arise in accordance with workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Address hazards and incidents as they arise in accordance with workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Maintain a chain of custody, traceable to the worker, for all cells and tissues
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Maintain a chain of custody, traceable to the worker, for all cells and tissues?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain a chain of custody, traceable to the worker, for all cells and tissues.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Work safely according to the legal and regulatory framework

elements.title: Prepare and test cell or tissue culture media

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select and confirm media specifications and processes and methods.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare culture media to suit the application.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Sterilise culture media and check for sterility?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Sterilise culture media and check for sterility.

pcs.text: Perform quality control checks to ensure that culture media is fit for purpose
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Perform quality control checks to ensure that culture media is fit for purpose?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Perform quality control checks to ensure that culture media is fit for purpose.

pcs.text: Store culture media in accordance with specifications
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Store culture media in accordance with specifications?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Store culture media in accordance with specifications.

elements.title: Use tissue or cell culture preparation techniques

pcs.text: Select tissue or cell sample to optimise growth and prepare it for culture

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select tissue or cell sample to optimise growth and prepare it for culture.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Inoculate culture medium using aseptic techniques.

elements.title: Monitor tissue or cell culture

pcs.text: Incubate culture in specified conditions

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Incubate culture in specified conditions.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor growth of culture and record appearance and characteristics.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify expected cell types and recognise normal and abnormal cells.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Report presence or absence of contamination.

pcs.text: Subculture the culture to continue the cell line

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Subculture the culture to continue the cell line.

pcs.text: Dispose of biohazardous and other laboratory waste safely
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Dispose of biohazardous and other laboratory waste safely?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Dispose of biohazardous and other laboratory waste safely.
